task_completion.description: Load the food.gdt dataset and specify the model food_exp = const + income.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script or GUI showing the loading of 'food.gdt' and the formula 'food_exp = const + income' (or similar syntax like 'ols food_exp const income').
A script showing a loop over the 40 observations for LOO-CV (excluding one, training on the rest, predicting the excluded), or the use of a built-in cross-validation function that performs LOO-CV.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated MSPE and RMSPE to cv_results.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, file explorer, or text editor showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/cv_results.txt' containing 'MSPE: <value>' and 'RMSPE: <value>'.

task_completion.description: Save the actual and predicted values to cv_predictions.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, file explorer, or text editor showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/cv_predictions.csv' with columns/data for actual 'food_exp' and predicted values.

integrity.description: The agent calculated the metrics rather than hardcoding the expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script contains logic to compute MSPE and RMSPE from the errors, rather than just printing the final numbers directly.

integrity.description: The output files were generated by running the script/tool, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the script being executed, or the script contains file writing commands (e.g., outfile, write, to_csv) rather than the agent manually creating the output files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual food.gdt file rather than hardcoding the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script opens 'food.gdt' instead of defining an array or list of raw data values in the code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual food.gdt dataset has 40 observations. A correct implementation of LOO-CV on this dataset for the model 'food_exp = const + income' yields approximately MSPE = 8334.76 and RMSPE = 91.29. Note that any reference to MSPE ≈ 872.62 or RMSPE ≈ 29.54 comes from a flawed verifier script with incorrect hardcoded data; the agent should use the actual food.gdt file, which results in the 8334.76 / 91.29 values.
